slide0.title: Welcome to Telea
slide0.description: Speak like you always know what to say.

slide1.title: Write your script
slide1.description: Add a title and your content.

slide2.title: Press play and speak
slide2.description: Telea follows your voice and scrolls for you.

authorizer.title: Enter your license key
authorizer.subtitle: To continue, please enter your license key.
authorizer.help: If you need help, please contact us at <support>support@usetelea.online</support>

errors.timeout: Connection timed out. Please try again.
errors.failed: Failed to activate. Please try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

deviceStatus.title: Device not active
deviceStatus.description: This device is no longer active on your license. Try again or sign in with a different license key.
deviceStatus.help: If you need help, please contact us at <support>support@usetelea.online</support>

textList.title: Your scripts
textList.subtitle: Select a script to load into the prompter
textList.emptyHint: Create your first script to get started

updater.title: New update available
updater.subtitle: A new version of Telea is ready to be installed.
updater.restartHint: Telea will restart automatically after installation.
